name: python3-extproxy
title: python3-extproxy
summary: Extend urllib2's ProxyHandler to support extra proxy types
description:
Extend urllib2's ProxyHandler to support extra proxy types
ExtProxy extend urllib2's ProxyHandler to support extra proxy types:
HTTPS, SOCKS. It provides a consistent user experience like HTTP
proxy for the users.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-extproxy because Extend urllib2's ProxyHandler to support extra proxy types.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-extproxy as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-extproxy with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-extproxy --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
